name: Tax Refund for Spirits Returned to Bond

eligibility.description: Claim must be filed by the proprietor within 6 months of the date the spirits are returned to the bonded premises.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides an abatement, credit, or refund of tax (without interest) for distilled spirits that are returned to the bonded premises of a distilled spirits plant.
